title: ficus hispida var. rubra
intro: Ficus hispida var. rubra, also known as the Banyan fig or red-fruited banyan fig, is a variety of the Ficus hispida plant that is native to tropical Asia and Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus hispida var. rubra include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Ficus hispida var. rubra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies.
